title: Drymoanthus neocaledonicus
taxonomy: Drymoanthus neocaledonicus belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification places it within the larger group of flowering plants, angiosperms. At the species level, it is a member of the genus Drymoanthus, which comprises several species of orchids. Within the Orchidaceae family, Drymoanthus neocaledonicus is further classified as a type of terrestrial orchid. Its classification is part of a larger systematic framework for understanding plant diversity and relationships.
